title: Blue Paradise
description: Modern Resource Pack with blue theme and many addons.
body:
[![https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3127](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dOLVvHgi/images/34bb4b86b09bc3882d7e3fd2069ee13a21d84387.png)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3127) ![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97c5677253ec9fe4812369eb158181afa3b5d57d.png) ### Modern Resource Pack focused on better vanilla experience Contains many additions which make the game looks prettier and your gameplay easier ## 🔎Optifine Features If you want to have all features you need:
Fabric based Modpack with [**Continuity**](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity), [**Skyboxify**](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyboxify), [**ETF**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), [**Polytone**](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) and [**Respackopts**](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)

**We're highly recommending using [🟢Fabric Boosted](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabric-boosted) which have all necessary mods pre-installed** # 📒Features:
📜GUI - Blue themed GUI
- Smoother Font
- Colorful Enchantments Level
- Additional info in Anvil, Smithing Table and Brewing Stand GUI
- Custom Main Screen
🔎Optifine Features - Connected outline on all Ores -> Continuity required
- Custom Sky textures -> Skyboxify required
- Blue level number in GUI -> Polytone required
- Some Random Entities texture -> ETF required
⛏️Custom Item Textures - Tools and Weapons depending on enchantments -> full list available below
- Enchantment Books
- Axolotl Buckets
- Fireworks
- Suspicous Stews
- Ominous Bottles
- Goat Horns
- Invisible Item Frames
✔️Quality of Life - Visible Suspicous Gravel and Sand
- Visible Floating Blocks
- Visible stage of Lever
- Visible Note Block pitch
- More visible Invisible particles
- More visible Powder Snow
- More visible Growing Amethyst Block
- Smaller Swords
- Smaller and color accurate Spears
- Lower Shield in First Person View
- Lower Grass
- Ping Color Indicator
- Classic and visible Banner Pattern textures
- More visible Hearts in HUD
💡Vanilla Tweaks - Visible Infested Stones
- Visible honey stage of Beehives
- Visible Waxed Copper Blocks (Only in GUI)
- Smaller Food on mainhand and offhand
- Smaller Totem on mainhand and offhand
- No overlay on Spyglass
- Quiter Mob sounds (most annoying)
- Directional Hoppers, Dispensers, Droppers and Observers
- No Pumpking overlay
- Visible Cauldron progress
- Quiter Rain, Thunder, Fire, Water, Explosions, Minecarts, Nether Portals, Pistons, Cave sounds
- Ashless Campfires - Better Sticky Piston texture
- Better XP Bootle texture
- No Falling Leaves
- Old Ghast textures
💎Aesthetic - Classic Dye textures
- Circural Logs
- Custom Enchantments Icons
- Custom Enchantment Glint
- More accurate Smithing Template texture
- Prettier Cherry Leaves
- Prettier Pitcher Crop
# ⭐ Enchantment Based Textures List of Enchantments that have affect in texture
*Also available in all combinations*
Enchantments Armor (Diamond & Netherite)
- Protection 4

Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, Hoe (Diamond & Netherite)
- Efficiency 5
- Fortune 3
- Silk Touch
- Mending

Sword (Diamond & Netherite)
- Sharpness 5
- Smite 5
- Mending
- Looting 3
- Fire Aspect 2

Bow
- Power 5
- Flame
- Infinity

Crossbow
- Piercing 4
- Quick Charge 3

Mace
- Breach 4
- Density 5
- Fire Aspect 2
- Wind Burst 3
- Mending

Spear (Diamond & Netherite)
- Fire Aspect 2
- Looting 3
- Lunge 3
- Mending
- Sharpness 5

Trident
- Impaling 5
- Loyalty 3
- Riptide 3

Elytra
- Mending
- Unbreaking 3

Brush
- Mending
- Unbreaking 3
# Credits: Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
[ASCII HD](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/ascii-hd-v1-0/)
[XXVI's Floating Blocks](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/xxvi-s-floating-blocks-warning-you-won-t-fall-anymore/)
[Enchanted Books and Icons](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/visual-enchantments/)
